text: The objective of this research is to explain the implementation of text-rich environment in PAUD institutions and children’s language development. This research used qualitative approach with case study method. The subject of this research is children in PAUD Shafa Marwah. The data was collected by observing, interviewing and collecting documentation. The results showed that the implementation of the text-rich environment in PAUD Shafa Marwah went well. Children have shown great enthusiasm towards the reading materials provided and they are actively interacting with the text. This causes the improvement of children’s language development in terms of vocabulary, reading skill, and speaking skill. Keywords: Text-rich environment; language development; early childhood
explanation: The passage uses conventional academic phrasing and domain-specific terms without obvious AI hallmarks, suggesting human-written style, though AI could also produce similar text.
